Name: CRM Systems
Description 1:
‍

‍

A Real World Example

‍

🧠 "AI Client Onboarding System"

This workflow turns a successful payment into a fully-automated client onboarding sequence. It confirms the payment in your CRM, creates and shares the client’s workspace, stores the signed contract, sends a personalized welcome + step-by-step onboarding email, and updates the CRM with links and status—no manual work.

Step-by-step flow

  • Trigger – Payment received
    A webhook fires when the payment is confirmed.
  • Find client in CRM
    Looks up the client record (e.g., by email/order ID).
  • Mark payment as Paid
    Updates the client/deal record to reflect the transaction.
  • Router → two parallel lanes

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lane 1: Workspace & docs

  • Create & share Drive folder for the client.
  • Get share link and permissions.
  • Upload contract (or key docs) to the folder.
  • Update CRM with folder link/contract URL.

Lane 2: Welcome & instructions

  • Create & share Drive folder for the client.
  • Get share link and permissions.
  • Upload contract (or key docs) to the folder.
  • Update CRM with folder link/contract URL.

‍

Name: Content Creation Systems
Description 1:
‍

‍

A Real World Example

‍

🧠 "AI Content Syndication System"

An automation that takes a single piece of content and instantly adapts, formats, and distributes it across multiple platforms (Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter/X, and Medium). This ensures maximum reach and consistent branding without manually posting.

Step-by-Step Flow:

  • Pull content from Airtable (search records).
  • Generate platform-specific posts with AI (tailored to each channel’s style).
  • Parse JSON (clean up AI output).
  • Fetch supporting files/images via HTTP.
  • Route content to multiple publishing channels.
  • Post to Facebook (with images).
  • Post to LinkedIn (with user image).
  • Post to Instagram (via Facebook login).
  • Post to Twitter/X (with media).
  • Generate long-form Markdown article with AI.
  • Generate optimized article title with AI.
  • Publish full article to Medium.

Name: Lead-Gen Systems
Description 1:
‍

‍

A Real World Example

‍

🧠 "Lead Magnet Generator"

An automated flow that builds and delivers a complete lead magnet package (strategy, post, checklist, document, and email delivery) using AI and integrations. It ensures every new lead gets immediate value in a polished, branded format without manual work.

Step-by-Step Flow:

  • Set variables (lead info, campaign details).
  • Add to CRM (create new record for tracking).
  • Send data via HTTP (fetch or push external info).
  • Generate basic marketing strategy with AI.
  • Generate 1 free social media post with AI.
  • Parse JSON (structure AI output).
  • Generate post image with AI.
  • Generate checklist with AI.
  • Create doc (assemble checklist & strategy).
  • Download doc (final formatted file).
  • Wait 5 minutes (staggered timing).
  • Deliver lead magnet via email (send full package to the lead).

Name: Sales Systems
Description 1:
‍

‍

Real World Examples

‍

🧠 "Automatic Proposal Generator"

This workflow turns a completed discovery call form into a polished proposal with a project timeline, then sends it to the prospect automatically. It uses AI to draft the content, structures it with JSON, builds the proposal in your document tool, and emails it—cutting proposal turnaround from hours to minutes.

Step-by-step flow

  • Trigger – Discovery form submitted
    A new response to the Discovery Call form kicks off the scenario.
  • Stabilize – Short delay
    A brief sleep step ensures all form data is available before processing.
  • Collect details – Fetch full responses
    The system pulls the structured answers from the form tool (Typeform).
  • Draft proposal – AI generation
    Using the prospect’s inputs, AI writes a tailored proposal (scope, value, pricing notes, next steps).
  • Structure content – JSON parse
    The AI output is parsed into clean sections (e.g., overview, deliverables, pricing, assumptions).
  • Build plan – AI milestones & timeline
    A second AI pass creates a phased milestone plan with suggested timelines.
  • Normalize – JSON parse
    Milestones/timelines are parsed into a consistent, machine-readable list.
  • Create document – Proposal assembly
    The content is merged into your proposal template and a new document is created (e.g., PandaDoc).
  • Send – Email the proposal
    The prospect receives an email with the proposal and a brief summary; your team can be CC’d.

‍

‍

🧠 “Talent Magnet AI” (3 Step Flow)

The system scrapes target companies for active job listings, summarizes each role, enriches leads with LinkedIn data, and generates personalized cold email icebreakers that are logged back into Sheets. Those enriched leads are then sent to Instantly for outreach, with any replies instantly notified to recruiters via Slack.

Step One — Scraping + Icebreaker (Above)

  • Trigger – Account list update (Google Sheets)
    A new recruiter client account is added or updated in the tracking sheet.
  • Scrape – Ideal audience leads
    Apify scrapes company career pages and job boards for new active listings matching the target hiring roles (e.g., nursing, clinical, allied health).
  • Summarize – Job AI
    Each job posting is summarized automatically, extracting role, urgency, and department context.
  • Enrich – LinkedIn data
    Apify pulls public details from each hiring manager's or HR lead's LinkedIn profile.
  • Generate – Cold email icebreaker
    AI writes a short, human-sounding intro based on both the job data and the recruiter's context.
  • Update – Back to Sheets
    Each lead record is enriched with job summary, hiring intent, and a personalized icebreaker ready for outreach.

‍

Icebreaker Example —> "Hey Dave, Love what you're doing at Henry J. Carter — also in hospital care. Wanted to run something by you. I saw you've been trying to fill the Psych Nurse Practitioner role in Correctional Health — tough spot to staff. Since diversity and stability matter to you, we've helped hospitals hire strong permanent talent in similar cases."

‍

‍

Step Two — Campaign Push (Below)

The new leads + icebreakers are synced into Instantly for outbound campaigns.

‍

Step Three — Reply Notifications (Below)

Incoming replies trigger Slack alerts, tagging the recruiter with lead name, company, and snippet preview.
